description: NULL mutant — inserts an extra space in a whitespace-insensitive location. Behaviourally identical; both the legacy spec and the v2 journey MUST still pass. Guards against a broken harness that reports false kills (e.g. a build failure counted as 'caught').
Goal-form max-depth control loses its testid. Legacy goal-proposal-subgoal-prefill.spec.ts asserts prefilled subgoal controls; proposals journey does not (GAP).
Worktree-cleanup maintenance card loses its testid. Legacy settings-maintenance-archived-worktrees.spec.ts asserts counts + cleanup POST; project-settings journey does not (GAP).
Directory-picker typeahead suggestions container loses its testid. Legacy add-project-typeahead.spec.ts asserts the suggestion overlay; project-onboarding journey does not (GAP).

The dashboard Children-tab 'Allow sub-goals' settings toggle loses its testid. Legacy subgoal-existing-goal-settings.spec.ts drives it to enable subgoals on an existing parent + persist; goal-editing journey only asserts tab-children presence (GAP).

The Agent Directory maintenance Validate button loses its testid. Legacy settings-agent-dir.spec.ts asserts the validate control enables after a path is entered; project-settings journey does not (GAP).
The editable-proposal Apply/Accept button label loses its testid. Legacy proposal-edit-flow.spec.ts locates the Apply button via accept-label; proposals journey does not (GAP).
The multi-repo scan checklist selected-count readout loses its testid. Legacy add-project-select-all.spec.ts asserts the count text through select/deselect; project-onboarding journey does not (GAP).

The add-project preflight archive-CTA (surfaced when a ghost .bobbit/ dir is detected) loses its testid. Legacy add-project-post-archive.spec.ts drives the CTA; project-onboarding journey does not (GAP).

The non-goal terminate confirmation drops the enumerated child-agent NAMES (keeps only the count). Legacy archive-child-cascade.spec.ts asserts each child title appears in the modal; team-operations journey only checks the children-count API, not the modal names (GAP).

After a goal is archived the dashboard read-only banner text changes so it no longer says 'Dashboard is read-only.'. Legacy goal-archive-always-on.spec.ts asserts the banner text post-archive; goal-editing journey only polls the archived flag via API (GAP).

The optional-step tooltip drops the workflow step description from its title attribute. Legacy goal-form-tooltips.spec.ts asserts title=/QA agent/i + /ephemeral server/i; goal-editing journey only asserts the icon/cursor-help/text (GAP).

The dev-harness Restart Server control renders even when the harness restart endpoint is unavailable (its hide-guard is disabled). Legacy settings-restart-button.spec.ts asserts the button is absent by default; project-settings journey does not (GAP).

search:
state.previewTitle = g.title;
	if (!state.previewSpecEdited && typeof g.spec === "string") state.previewSpec = g.spec;
replace:
state.previewTitle = g.title;
	if (false && !state.previewSpecEdited && typeof g.spec === "string") state.previewSpec = g.spec;
description: reconcileGoalSlotIntoFormMirror stops restoring the goal spec into the form-mirror on session (re)attach, so navigating away and back renders the goal-proposal panel with an empty spec. Legacy proposal-spec-survives-navigate.spec.ts asserts the spec body survives nav-away/back; proposals journey never navigates away and back (GAP).

The unified onProposal path stops mirroring the merged goal spec into the form-mirror (previewSpec), so an edit_proposal revision does not auto-update the assistant panel in place. Legacy goal-proposal-revision-autoupdate.spec.ts asserts the edited spec appears with no 'Open proposal' click; proposals journey never drives a revision (GAP).

The goal-proposal Workflow-tab 'Customise for this goal' button loses its testid. Legacy goal-proposal-workflow-tab.spec.ts drives Customise→editor+Revert→back; proposals journey never opens the Workflow tab (GAP).

The goal-assistant Create Goal request drops the user-enabled optional steps (always sends undefined). Legacy goal-creation.spec.ts asserts the created goal's enabledOptionalSteps contains the toggled 'QA testing' step; goal-editing journey never drives the optional-steps toggle through creation (GAP).

A provisional project (created via Add Project → assistant) loses its '(setting up)' sidebar indicator. Legacy project-assistant.spec.ts asserts the provisional '(setting up)' marker; project-settings journey only checks shell stability (GAP).

The multi-repo scan Continue-with-assistant autoPrompt sends ALL scan item ids instead of only the user-selected subset. Legacy add-project-multi-repo-subset.spec.ts asserts the autoPrompt JSON selectedIds equals the chosen subset; project-onboarding journey never inspects the autoPrompt (GAP).

The project-proposal Workflows-view workflow cards lose their testid. Legacy project-assistant.spec.ts asserts per-component + all-components workflow cards render under the Workflows tab; proposals journey does not exercise the project-proposal structured views (GAP).
